top_signals.title: Gold Set for Weekly Loss on Hawkish Fed and Peace Deal Jitters
top_signals.summary: Gold dropped, heading for a third weekly loss as traders weighed delays in negotiations over a permanent Middle East peace deal and the outlook for US interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump DNI pick Pulte poised to get access to U.S. intelligence despite congressional bid to thwart
top_signals.summary: With President Donald Trump halting his nomination of  U.S. Attorney Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence, Bill Pulte is set to take on the role.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Bank of Eufaula and S N B Bancshares, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Bank of Eufaula and S N B Bancshares, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Starbucks Cuts UK, Hong Kong Office Jobs in Restructuring Effort
top_signals.summary: Starbucks Corp. laid off corporate workers in the London and Hong Kong hubs that oversee parts of its international business, as the coffee chain gives third-party licensees greater latitude to run its stores outside of North America.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Indian billionaire Mukesh Ambani files for blockbuster Jio float
top_signals.summary: Listing of Reliance Industries’ telecoms business expected to be India’s largest ever
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
